titleStmt.title: SII 16.111: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 111. (A.R. No. 348 of 1920.) PĀMIḌI, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone lying at the western end of the main street of the village.
The record is dated Śaka 1457, Manmatha, Kārtika śu. 15, corresponding to 1535 A.D., November 9, (Tuesday).

It records a gift of the various tax incomes of the newly created hamlet to the west of Pāmiḍi to god Bhōgiśvara of Pāmuḍi by Mahamaṇḍalēśvara Tirumalayya- deva mahārāju, son of Mallinātha Yeṟayadēva mahārāju. The donor is said to have received the village Pāmuḍi as māgāṇi from [Peda] Salakarāju Tirumalayyadēva mahārāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śaka
1452 Agunēṭi ma(ṁ)nmatha saṁvatsara
kā¨rttika śu 15 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa Accutadēvarāyamahā
rāyalu pṛdhvirājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍagā kāsyapagōtra
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara mallanātha yeṟayadē
va mahārājula kumāruṁḍu tirumalayadēva
mahārājulugāru śrīmatkayilāsa ni
vāsuḍayina pāmuḍi śrībhōgēśvaruniki daṁḍaṁveṭi
yicina bhūdāna śāsanaṁ śrīma(ṁ)nmahāmaṁḍalēśvara sala
ka rāju pedatirumalayadēva mahārājulu māke māgāṇi
ki pāliṁcina jagatāpigutti sīmalōni pāmiḍini grā
maṁ paḍumaṭanu pāḷeṁ gaṭiṁci Ā pāḷeṁlōni
pullari sidhāyaṁ paṁnu kānike guti suṁkhaṁ sta
lasuṁkhaṁ sakalasuva¨rṇādāyāluṁnu śrī
bhōgēśvaruniki Ācaṁdrā¨rkaṁ naḍacēAṭugā dhā
ravōsi yicina dha[¨rma]śāsanaṁ yī dha¨rmānaku E
varu tapinānu vāraṇāsilō tama talidaṁḍṟla
vadhiṁcinavāru gōhatya cēsina pāpāna bōdurū
sivadrōhulu śrībhōgēśvara Aḷaghari
sina dha¨rmaśāsanamu śrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.111 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
